segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: There are classes for 3 days in a week so that your house and children are not disturbed and you can attend the classes properly.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01

segments.text: Okay ma'am, please share my address and I will come there and check the rest.
